title: Gray Death (Yevethan)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Gray Death''' was a deadly disease which affected the [[Yevetha]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Behind the scenes==
This disease is not to be confused with [[FNV-23]], informally referred to as the Gray Death.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
